name: Gelbin Faux Leather Slipper Chair with Wood Legs - Threshold™
description:
Make a stylish and comfy addition to your seating ensemble with this Gelbin Faux-Leather Slipper Chair with Wood Legs from Threshold™. Designed with faux-leather upholstery for a luxe look, this armless slipper chair is set on four wooden tapered legs for modern flair. The caramel upholstery pairs elegantly with the black wooden legs for a sleek look and rich color in any room of your home. Style this brown slipper chair in your living room, study area or any other space to relax in comfortable style.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
